summary: SINGLE_FOCUS: ComplexPlane with 2 simultaneous paths from -1-i (GREEN) to 1+i (RED): BLUE straight line and PURPLE semicircle through origin. ValueTracker s_tr sweeps 0→1 tracing both via always_redraw trails + rider dots. Live numerical contour integrals for z² — both equal (z₁³-z₀³)/3 at s=1 (path-independent for holomorphic).
